name: Abby Binder
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Power100 and Abby Binder Spotlight Sustainable Growth at Growth Mastery Summit 2025 in Dulles, Virginia","url":"https://power100.io/power100-and-abby-binder-spotlight-sustainable-growth-at-growth-mastery-summit-2025-in-dulles-virginia/"}]
ic_contributor_bio: Abby Binder launched Abby Windows & Doors from scratch in 2010 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The company experienced over 80% growth from 2015-2016 and now bills $12 million annually on 600 jobs. Named to Qualified Remodeler's Top 500 (#18), Abby is one of the brightest rising stars in the home improvement industry — a growth-minded leader always looking for new ways to improve her people and upgrade processes.

name: Alex Marck
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Power100 Featured Interview Spotlights Alex Marck and the First Call Closer Sales Revolution","url":"https://power100.io/power100-featured-interview-spotlights-alex-marck-and-the-first-call-closer-sales-revolution/"}]
ic_contributor_bio: Alex Marck is CEO of First Call Closer, a home improvement sales technology company that creates custom tablet-based presentations for contractor sales teams. His platform helps sales forces close more deals on the first appointment through branded presentations and real-time sales management tools. Alex also hosts the '1st Call Closer' podcast, analyzing real in-home sales recordings to help listeners improve their close rates.

name: Andy Lindus
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"PowerChat with Greg Cummings Highlights Leadership Insights from Andy Lindus, Ranked #4 CEO in the Nation for 2026 by Power100","url":"https://power100.io/powerchat-with-greg-cummings-highlights-leadership-insights-from-andy-lindus-ranked-4-ceo-in-the-nation-for-2026-by-power100/"},{"title":"Power100 Announces Andy Lindus as #4 CEO in the Nation for 2026: People-First Leadership Transforming Home Improvement Culture, Technology & Custo","url":"https://power100.io/power100-announces-andy-lindus-as-4-ceo-in-the-nation-for-2026-people-first-leadership-transforming-home-improvement-culture-technology-customer-experience/"}]

name: Anne Marshall
ic_contributor_bio: Anne Marshall is co-owner of Marshall Building and Remodeling, a roofing, siding, and window company based in Rhode Island. Ranked #24 CEO in the nation by Power100, Anne won the Gold Stevie Award for Female Executive of the Year in Consumer Products. She leads one of the few woman-owned home improvement companies, with an exceptional team of women in leadership roles driving the company's evolution and customer experience.

name: Brad Yoho
ic_contributor_bio: Brad Yoho serves as President of Dave Yoho Associates, the oldest and most successful consulting firm in the home improvement industry. Carrying forward the legacy of the firm's legendary founder, Brad leads the company's consulting practice serving home improvement businesses across the country with sales training, management consulting, and business growth strategies.

name: Caleb Nelson
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"A Day in the Life of Caleb Nelson at EcoView Dealer Summit: How Destination Motivation Is Transforming Close Rates and Reducing Cancellations","url":"https://power100.io/a-day-in-the-life-of-caleb-nelson-at-ecoview-dealer-summit-how-destination-motivation-is-transforming-close-rates-and-reducing-cancellations/"},{"title":"Caleb Nelson Reveals Why Customer Experience Is Becoming the Ultimate Sales Advantage for Home Improvement Contractors","url":"https://power100.io/caleb-nelson-reveals-why-customer-experience-is-becoming-the-ultimate-sales-advantage-for-home-improvement-contractors/"},{"title":"Power100 Spotlights Destination Motivation CEO Caleb Nelson at EcoView Dealer Summit in Biloxi—How Travel Incentives Are Reducing Cancellations and In","url":"https://power100.io/power100-spotlights-destination-motivation-ceo-caleb-nelson-at-ecoview-dealer-summit-in-biloxi-how-travel-incentives-are-reducing-cancellations-and-increasing-close-rates-for-home-improvement/"}]

name: Chris Pallatroni
ic_contributor_bio: Chris Pallatroni has been a driving force behind the success of Modernize Home Services for over 15 years. As co-founder, he developed and leads many of the business's core competencies and growth strategies connecting homeowners with contractors. Before Modernize, Chris co-founded Home Improvement Leads and CalFinder. He also co-hosts Modernize's Build Better podcast for home improvement contractors.

name: Chuck Thokey
ic_contributor_bio: Chuck Thokey is a sales and marketing coach, author, mentor, and one of the home services industry's top keynote speakers. He co-founded Top Rep Sales Training in 2020 after pivoting from his roots as a flight test engineer at Bombardier Learjet. He also serves as VP of Sales for American WeatherTECHS, one of the fastest-growing exterior remodeling companies in Ohio. His training platform serves contractors across North America, Canada, and Mexico.

name: Dashaun Bryant
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Roofing Trainer Dashaun Bryant Delivers Powerful "Go Pro" Message at RoofCON in Orlando, Inspiring Industry Leaders to Elevate Their Game","url":"https://power100.io/roofing-trainer-dashaun-bryant-delivers-powerful-go-pro-message-at-roofcon-in-orlando-inspiring-industry-leaders-to-elevate-their-game/"}]

name: Dave Yoho
ic_contributor_bio: Dave Yoho is the founder of Dave Yoho Associates — the oldest, largest, and most successful consulting firm in the home improvement, remodeling, and home services industries. Dubbed the 'GOAT' of the industry, Dave founded a company at age 28 that grew to 22 branches in 13 states with $60M in volume. Over 50+ years, his firm has produced hundreds of live events and training programs. He has appeared in over 100 training videos and authored the best-selling 'Have a Great Year Every Year.'

name: Dustin Rhoades
ic_contributor_bio: Dustin Rhoades is a Senior Vice President of Sales at Great Day Improvements with over 22 years in the home improvement industry. He has held leadership roles at several top companies including Dreamstyle Remodeling and Renewal By Andersen. Author of 'Dumb Tax: Find Your Why For Hiring,' Dustin brings deep expertise in sales management and team building across multiple regions.

name: James Freeman
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Leadership Insights from the #1 Home Improvement Company: Greg Cummings Interviews PJ Fitzpatrick CEO James Freeman","url":"https://power100.io/leadership-insights-from-the-1-home-improvement-company-greg-cummings-interviews-pj-fitzpatrick-ceo-james-freeman/"},{"title":"James Freeman Named Nation's #1 CEO for 2026 by Power100: Leading PJ Fitzpatrick to Unprecedented Growth and Excellence in Home Improvement Industry","url":"https://power100.io/james-freeman-named-nations-1-ceo-for-2026-by-power100-leading-pj-fitzpatrick-to-unprecedented-growth-and-excellence-in-home-improvement-industry/"},{"title":"Power100 Spotlights PJ Fitzpatrick’s Leadership and Culture Excellence as James Freeman Ranks as the Nation’s #1 Home Improvement CEO","url":"https://power100.io/power100-spotlights-pj-fitzpatricks-leadership-and-culture-excellence-as-james-freeman-ranks-as-the-nations-1-home-improvement-ceo/"}]

name: Jamey Vumback
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"PowerChat with Greg Cummings and Jamey Vumback Explores How Referral Systems Are Transforming Growth for Home Service Companies","url":"https://power100.io/powerchat-with-greg-cummings-and-jamey-vumback-explores-how-referral-systems-are-transforming-growth-for-home-service-companies/"}]

name: Marcus Sheridan
ic_contributor_bio: Marcus Sheridan is an award-winning speaker named a 'web marketing guru' by The New York Times. He saved his swimming pool company, River Pools, from the 2008 economic crash through content marketing — a story that became his best-selling book 'They Ask, You Answer,' named one of the 5 Best Marketing Books of All Time by BookAuthority. Forbes named him 1 of 20 Speakers You Don't Want to Miss, and he averages 50 keynotes yearly worldwide.

name: Nick Richmond
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"From Blue Ocean to Basement Empire: How PowerChat Guest Nick Richmond Turned Matrix Home Solutions into America's Basement Finishing Leader","url":"https://power100.io/from-blue-ocean-to-basement-empire-how-powerchat-guest-nick-richmond-turned-matrix-home-solutions-into-americas-basement-finishing-leader/"},{"title":"Power100 PowerChat: Why Greg Cummings Calls Nick Richmond One of Home Improvement's Most Disciplined Leaders","url":"https://power100.io/power100-powerchat-why-greg-cummings-calls-nick-richmond-one-of-home-improvements-most-disciplined-leaders/"},{"title":"PowerChat with Nick Richmond: How Matrix Home Solutions Became a Basement-Only Powerhouse for Homeowners","url":"https://power100.io/powerchat-with-nick-richmond-how-matrix-home-solutions-became-a-basement-only-powerhouse-for-homeowners/"},{"title":"PowerChat Leadership Edition: How Nick Richmond Built Matrix Home Solutions on Faith, Discipline, and People-First Leadership","url":"https://power100.io/powerchat-leadership-edition-how-nick-richmond-built-matrix-home-solutions-on-faith-discipline-and-people-first-leadership/"}]
ic_contributor_bio: Nick Richmond founded Matrix Basement Finishing in 2009, growing it from a $3,500 startup during the recession into the largest basement finishing company in the United States. With over 15,000 basement projects completed, Richmond built the company around a singular focus — basement finishing exclusively. Matrix developed the proprietary Forever Wall system, using metal framing and moisture-resistant materials engineered specifically for basement environments.

name: Patrick Rinard
ic_contributor_bio: Patrick Rinard is the CEO of Bee Window, ranked #36 in the nation by Power100. A premier leader in the home improvement industry, Rinard has built Bee Window into a respected name in windows, doors, and home exteriors through disciplined operations, customer-first culture, and strategic growth.

name: Paul Burleson
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"How Westlake Royal Building Products and Paul Burleson Power Reese Wholesale’s Contractors to Be True Experts in the Home","url":"https://power100.io/how-westlake-royal-building-products-and-paul-burleson-power-reese-wholesales-contractors-to-be-true-experts-in-the-home/"},{"title":"International Roofing Expo 2026: How Paul Burleson's Belief in the Right Things, Process, and Systems Turns Grit into Opportunity","url":"https://power100.io/international-roofing-expo-2026-how-paul-burlesons-belief-in-the-right-things-process-and-systems-turns-grit-into-opportunity/"},{"title":"Paul Burleson Officially Inducted Into the Legends Ring of Honor at the Peak Profit Summit in St. Louis","url":"https://power100.io/paul-burleson-officially-inducted-into-the-legends-ring-of-honor-at-the-peak-profit-summit-in-st-louis/"},{"title":"Paul Burleson at Rilla Masters 2026 in Miami: How AI‑Driven Coaching Is Transforming In‑Person Sales for Contractors and Home Improvement Leaders","url":"https://power100.io/paul-burleson-at-rilla-masters-2026-in-miami-how-aidriven-coaching-is-transforming-inperson-sales-for-contractors-and-home-improvement-leaders/"},{"title":"Paul Burleson’s Speech at the Richards Building Supply Business Growth Expo – Grit to Gold Success Process","url":"https://power100.io/paul-burlesons-speech-at-the-richards-building-supply-business-growth-expo-grit-to-gold-success-process/"},{"title":"Paul Burleson: A Legend of the Home Improvement Industry – A Story Worth Telling","url":"https://power100.io/paul-burleson-a-legend-of-the-home-improvement-industry-a-story-worth-telling/"}]

name: Peter Svedin
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Power100 Shines Light On Lifetime Home Remodeling's Leadership Excellence As CEO Peter Svedin Ranks #2 Nationally for 2026","url":"https://power100.io/power100-shines-light-on-lifetime-home-remodelings-leadership-excellence-as-ceo-peter-svedin-ranks-2-nationally-for-2026/"},{"title":"Power100 Spotlights Lifetime Home Remodeling's Leadership Excellence & People-First Culture as CEO Peter Svedin Ranks #2 Nationally","url":"https://power100.io/power100-spotlights-lifetime-home-remodelings-leadership-excellence-people-first-culture-as-ceo-peter-svedin-ranks-6-nationally/"}]

name: Rich Harshaw
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Identity Over Price: Rich Harshaw Shares the Marketing Blueprint Helping Contractors Win More Leads and Close at Higher Margins","url":"https://power100.io/identity-over-price-rich-harshaw-shares-the-marketing-blueprint-helping-contractors-win-more-leads-and-close-at-higher-margins/"}]
ic_contributor_bio: Rich Harshaw is the CEO of Monopolize Your Marketplace (MYM), the authoritative voice on marketing for contractors and companies in the remodeling field since 1994. His company Y2Marketing made the Inc. 500 list of fastest-growing privately held companies for three consecutive years (2002-2004). Author of the book 'Monopolize Your Marketplace,' Rich has conducted over 30 seminars on lead generation, advertising, and internet marketing for contractors.

name: Steve Spence
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Contractor Industry Leader  Steve Spence Discusses the Future of Contractor Marketing, Storytelling, and Homeowner Trust in PowerChat Interview","url":"https://power100.io/contractor-industry-leader-steve-spence-discusses-the-future-of-contractor-marketing-storytelling-and-homeowner-trust-in-powerchat-interview/"}]

name: Taylor Hanes
ic_contributor_bio: Taylor Hanes is the Chief Operating Officer at One Click Contractor, coordinating Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success teams. A West Point graduate and former U.S. Army infantry officer, Taylor completed executive education at Stanford Graduate School of Business. He brings military discipline and strategic thinking to building productivity solutions for the home improvement contractor space.

name: Vic Sun
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"How Vic Sun Is Redefining Contractor Operations with AI and Automation in the Home Improvement Industry","url":"https://power100.io/how-vic-sun-is-redefining-contractor-operations-with-ai-and-automation-in-the-home-improvement-industry/"}]

name: Vince Venditti
ic_p100_articles: [{"title":"Vince Venditti Reflects on the Marketing Strategies Shaping the Future of Home Improvement","url":"https://power100.io/vince-venditti-reflects-on-the-marketing-strategies-shaping-the-future-of-home-improvement/"}]
ic_contributor_bio: Vince Venditti is the president and co-owner of Premier Home Pros in Akron, Ohio — one of the fastest-growing bathroom remodeling companies in the country. Launched in January 2023 with no outside investment, the company crossed $50 million in July 2024 and pushed to nearly $87 million by year-end. Previously CMO of American Residential Services and SVP at Leaf Home, Venditti was named to Crain's Cleveland 40 Under 40 and Qualified Remodeler's Top 500.

name: Voitek Kaniewski
ic_contributor_bio: Voitek Kaniewski co-founded OKNA Windows & Doors in 1994 with Yarek Ostaniewicz. Originally from Poland, the two met working in New York as general contractors before shifting focus to producing quality replacement windows in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. OKNA started in a 25,000 sq ft facility with 12 employees and has grown to over 200 employees in a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Bristol, PA.

name: Yarek Ostaniewicz
ic_contributor_bio: Yarek Ostaniewicz co-founded OKNA Windows & Doors in 1994 with Voitek Kaniewski. Originally from Poland, they met working in New York as general contractors before creating one of the most respected window manufacturing brands in the industry. OKNA has grown from a small 12-employee operation to over 200 employees, consistently redefining their commitment to product quality and customer satisfaction.
